revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Weimar Republic | shortname alias = Germany | flag alias = Flag of Germany (3-2 aspect ratio).svg | flag alias-civil = Merchant flag of Germany (1919–1933).svg | flag alias-1918=Flag of the German Empire.svg | flag alias-1919=Flag of Germany (3-2 aspect ratio).svg | flag alias-naval = War Ensign of Germany (1921–1933).svg | link alias-naval = Reichsmarine | flag alias-army = War Ensign of Germany (1921–1933).svg | link alias-army = Reichswehr{{!}}Reichsheer | flag alias-navy = War Ensign of Germany (1921–1933).svg | link alias-navy = Reichsmarine | flag alias-military = War Ensign of Germany (1921–1933).svg | link alias-military = Reichswehr | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | var2=1918 | var3=1919 | related1 = Germany | related2 = German Empire | related3 = Nazi Germany </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Weimar_Republic here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Weimar_Republic for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Weimar Republic | shortname alias = Germany | flag alias = Flag of Germany (3-2 aspect ratio).svg | flag alias-civil = Merchant flag of Germany (1919–1933).svg | flag alias-1918=Flag of the German Empire.svg | flag alias-1919=Flag of Germany (3-2 aspect ratio).svg | flag alias-naval = War Ensign of Germany (1921–1933).svg | link alias-naval = Reichsmarine | flag alias-army = War Ensign of Germany (1921–1933).svg | link alias-army = Reichswehr{{!}}Reichsheer | flag alias-navy = War Ensign of Germany (1921–1933).svg | link alias-navy = Reichsmarine | flag alias-military = War Ensign of Germany (1921–1933).svg | link alias-military = Reichswehr | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = civil | var2=1918 | var3=1919 | related1 = Germany | related2 = German Empire | related3 = Nazi Germany </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
